chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. PetitionNo.S-137 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 04-12-2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received so far. This petition is filed against alleged harassment. Learned AAG submits that on same cause of action, the petitioner had also filed Crl. Misc. Application under section 22-A&B CrPC, which has already been allowed. In view of above, this petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
